name: sample_plan_female_maintenance
description: 32yo female intermediate, 22% BF, maintenance goal, 5 days/week

notes: BF% was user-provided; consider verifying with Navy/calloipers.
Frame-size adjustment (wrist circumference): ±10% for small/large frame.
FFMI=16.7 — significant headroom to natural ceiling (23.9 kg FFM remaining at FFMI=25).
Berkhan stage-shredded max for height=170cm: 70.0 kg at 5-6% BF.
Expected monthly muscle gain (intermediate, female): ~0.23 kg/month with proper training + nutrition.

assessment.summary: Female, 32y, 170cm, 62.0kg • BMI 21.5 (normal) • BF% 22.0 (fitness, via user_provided) • LBM 48.4kg, fat mass 13.6kg • FFMI 16.7 (norm: 17.3, natural ceiling 25.0, 67% of ceiling) • Recommended: MAINTENANCE — User goal is maintenance.

notes: Saturated fat ceiling: <29 g (10% of calories).
~20% of daily fluid intake typically comes from food.
Fiber target: 37 g (14 g per 1,000 kcal)
At-risk nutrients for dieters: calcium, zinc, magnesium, iron, vitamin D.
Maintain dairy + red meat + sun exposure to avoid deficiencies.
Vegan/vegetarian Phase-2: add B12, iron, zinc, calcium, omega-3, D3, creatine.

notes: Volume target: 10-20 hard sets per muscle group per week (recomp/general).
Compound movements as foundation; progressive overload primary driver.
⚠ chest volume = 7 sets/wk (below 10-set minimum). Consider adding accessory work.
⚠ back volume = 23 sets/wk (above 20-set ceiling). Recovery may be compromised.
Phase-1 framework: ships with default templates. User-supplied exercise resources will extend the library in Phase-2.
Daily target: 2616 kcal, P107g / C384g / F73g
7-day rotating template — food choices vary daily for variety.
Vegetables are 'free' (low calorie, high volume) — add liberally.
Phase-1 framework: simple greedy allocator. Phase-2 will use optimization-based selection once detailed food database is loaded.
Swap proteins: chicken ↔ turkey ↔ fish; carbs: rice ↔ potato ↔ pasta.

plan.summary:

Assessment: BF=22.0% (fitness), BMI=21.5, FFMI=16.7
Strategy: MAINTENANCE
  — User goal is maintenance.
Nutrition:
  • TDEE: 2617 kcal

  • Fiber: 37 g/day

Training:

Meal plan:
